name: Lingyuan Iron & Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Lingyuan Iron & Steel Co., Ltd. engages in the steel mining, smelting, and rolling business in China. It offers rebars, broad stripes, steel bars, wire rods, steel strips, and steel pipes, as well as after-sales services. The company also exports its products. Lingyuan Iron & Steel Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Lingyuan, China.
